## What changed

Describe the user-visible behavior and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build --prefix frontend`)
- [ ] Relevant backend modules compile or tests pass
- [ ] UI changes include a screenshot or recording
- [ ] No credentials, local data, generated strategies, or build output are included
- [ ] Security implications of generated code, network access, and remote-agent output were considered
